text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Asahi Hai F.S., and the
normally calm Biwa Hayahide seems nervous
about participating in a big G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to do her best and incorporate what she
learns from this race in her calculations.
